endpoints.name: Get Pricing Configuration
endpoints.description:
Retrieves Pricing Configuration.
## Response body example

```json
{
    "hasMigrated": true,
    "migrationStatus": "Completed",
    "defaultMarkup": 100,
    "priceVariation": {
        "upperLimit": null,
        "lowerLimit": null
    },
    "minimumMarkups": {
        "1": 100,
        "2": 90
    },
    "tradePolicyConfigs": [],
    "sellersToOverride": [],
    "hasPriceInheritance": false,
    "priceInheritance": "never",
    "hasOptionalBasePrice": false,
    "blockAccount": false,
    "blockedRoutes": null,
    "priceTableSelectionStrategy": "first",
    "priceTableLimit": null
}
```
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get Pricing v2 Status
endpoints.description:
Retrieves Pricing v2 Status. 
## Response body example

```json
{
    "isActive": true,
    "hasMigrated": true
}
```
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Delete Price
endpoints.description: Deletes the Base Price and all available Fixed Prices for an SKU in all trade policies.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{ITEMID}} with a real itemid.

endpoints.name: Get Computed Price by price table or trade policy
endpoints.description:
Gets the Computed Price, which is the price after all the steps in the Pricing pipeline, for an SKU in a specific price table or trade policy. 

## Response body example

```json
{
    "tradePolicyId": "1",
    "listPrice": 30,
    "costPrice": 76.92,
    "sellingPrice": 18.9,
    "priceValidUntil": "2018-12-20T18:12:14Z"
}
```
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{PRICETABLEID}} with a real pricetableid. Replace {{ITEMID}} with a real itemid.

endpoints.name: List price tables
endpoints.description:
This method will list all price tables.

## Response body example

```json
[
    "1",
    "2",
    "3",
    "b2c",
    "b2b",
    "gold"
]
```
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.
